word: G738 - ἀρτιγέννητος - artigénnētos - ar-teeg-en'-nay-tos - New born

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρτιγέννητος

- Transliteration: Artigennetos

- Phonetic: ar-teeg-en'-nay-tos

- Definition:

1. just born, newborn

- Origin: from G737 and G1084

- TDNT entry: 12:12,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G737 and G1084; just born that is (figuratively) a young convert: - new born.
